description: Previsão ICMS-SP: adapta cenários macro, seleção de modelos, horizonte e outputs conforme request do usuário

example_requests: previsão base com todos os modelos
rodar sem análise qualitativa, só dashboard

qualitative_analysis.condition: user requests qualitative/narrative analysis or scenarios

cross_validate_r.condition: user requests R cross-check or first run

render_academic.condition: user requests academic appendix or full report

render_dashboard.condition: always unless user explicitly asks for academic only

prepare_base.pib_growth_override: detect from request: percentage or 'base' for Focus consensus
prepare_base.inflation_override: detect from request: percentage or 'base' for Focus consensus

run_sarimax_models.models_to_run: detect from request: list of model numbers 1-5 (default: all)
run_sarimax_models.n_simulations: detect from request: Monte Carlo count (default: 1000)
